description: Use deep reinforcement learning to guide SDS construction for the Goethals-Seidel array. RL agent sequentially adds elements to four blocks, with reward from autocorrelation defect. GNN policy on Cayley graph of Z_167. Curriculum transfer from small known instances.
mathematical_formalization: MDP: State = partial (X_0,...,X_3), Action = (block_id, element). Reward = -Delta(defect). Policy pi_theta via GNN on Cayley graph of Z_167.
analogical_connections: GNN on Cayley graph ~ AlphaFold geometry capture
implementation_hypothesis: GNN-based PPO agent. Curriculum: train on v=11, transfer to v=23, v=47, then v=167. Self-play episodes as construction attempts.
experiment_seed: Train RL on v=11 (order 44). Transfer to v=23 (order 92). Measure success rate and learned heuristic quality.
